title: Magnolia guide, moving to Seattle - StreetAdvisor
content: The Magnolia Bridge and West Dravus Street are the only two roads that drivers can use to access Magnolia, which makes for a very quiet neighborhood.

title: Built on expertly smashed patties, great service, and guests who ...

title: Review of Smith Tower Visitor Experience, Seattle, WA - Tripadvisor
content: It has a little museum-style display that you walk through to get to the top of the tower, which is cute. The view is incredible and the bar/restaurant is great

title: 17 W Dravus St, Seattle, WA 98119 | MLS# 2522958 | Redfin
content: Beautifully maintained Craftsman home in a prime Queen Anne location, just one block from the Fremont Cut, Burke-Gilman Trail, and Seattle
